name: WF0 - Lead Scoring & Tiering (LinkedIn → Apollo → Score)

nodes.name: Score Leads Now
nodes.notes: Click 'Test workflow' or 'Execute' to run lead scoring on-demand. Processes only unscored rows so you can run it multiple times as you add new leads.

nodes.name: Read Lead Sheet
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with your Google Sheet ID. Expected columns: Name, LinkedIn URL, Company (optional), Score (empty = unscored), Tier (empty = untiered). The workflow fills in Score, Tier, Outreach Type, Employee Count, Revenue Est, and Company.

nodes.name: Filter Unscored
nodes.notes: Only processes leads that don't have a Score yet. This makes the workflow incremental — run it again after adding new leads and it skips already-scored rows.

nodes.name: Parse Lead Data
nodes.notes: Extracts LinkedIn slug, first/last name, and preserves row index for writing scores back. Handles common column name variations.

nodes.name: Apollo Enrichment
nodes.notes: Apollo.io People Match API (free tier: 10,000 records/month for enrichment). Set up HTTP Header Auth credential: Header Name = 'x-api-key', Header Value = YOUR_APOLLO_API_KEY. Sign up at app.apollo.io — the free plan includes enrichment credits. If you hit rate limits, add a Wait node before this (1-2 sec delay).

nodes.name: Score & Tier Lead
nodes.notes:
Scoring algorithm (max 13 pts) — employee count + revenue + title:
• Employee count (0-5 pts): 50-200=5, 20-49=4, 10-19=3, 200+=3, 5-9=2 (below ICP), <5=1 (well below ICP)
• Revenue (0-5 pts): $10M+=5, $5-10M=4, $1-5M=3, <$1M=1
• Title/seniority (0-3 pts): CEO/Founder/Owner=3, COO/President/VP=2, Director=1

Flags: Leads with <10 employees are flagged as BELOW ICP in the Flags column.

Tiers:
• Tier 1 (10-13): Loom Video Priority
• Tier 2 (7-9): Loom Video
• Tier 3 (4-6): Personalized Text
• Tier 4 (0-3): Template Outreach

nodes.name: Write Scores to Sheet
nodes.notes: Writes scores back to the Google Sheet. Add these columns to your sheet header row: Score, Tier, Outreach Type, Employee Count, Revenue Est, Company, Title, Score Breakdown, Flags. The workflow matches rows by the 'LinkedIn URL' column (unique per lead). The Flags column highlights leads below ICP (<10 employees) or Apollo failures.

nodes.name: Fallback Score (No Apollo)
nodes.notes: If Apollo enrichment fails (rate limit, no match, API error), this fallback scores the lead using only data from the Google Sheet. These leads get flagged for manual review.

nodes.name: Loop Over Leads
nodes.notes: Processes leads one at a time to respect Apollo API rate limits (free tier). If you have a paid Apollo plan, increase batchSize for faster processing.

nodes.name: Rate Limit Delay
nodes.notes: 1.5 second inline delay between Apollo API calls. Uses a Code node instead of a Wait node because the Wait node suspends execution state which breaks the splitInBatches loop. Remove or reduce delay if you have a paid Apollo plan.
